summary: Completed testing of PlacementPrep iteration 2 features: File Upload (profile picture & resume), Product Tour, and regression testing. Fixed 3 bugs during testing: 1) react-joyride import syntax for v3, 2) forgot-password endpoint parameter handling, 3) ProductTour steps initialization. All 33 backend tests pass. Frontend features verified working.

minor.issue: Fixed - was expecting query param but frontend sends JSON body

ui_bugs.issue: Fixed - react-joyride v3 uses named export {Joyride} not default export
Fixed - steps array was empty on initial render, now initialized with dashboardSteps

action_items: Product Tour shows beacon instead of auto-starting tooltip - may need further investigation if auto-start is required
critical_code_review_comments: Password reset uses in-memory storage (reset_tokens dict) - will be lost on server restart. Consider using database or Redis for production.
Password reset email is MOCKED - only logs token to console, no actual email sent.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/ProductTour.js - Fixed import syntax and steps initialization
/app/backend/server.py - Fixed forgot-password endpoint to accept JSON body
/app/backend/tests/test_api.py - Updated password reset tests to use JSON body
/app/backend/tests/test_file_upload.py - Created new test file for file upload endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test user already exists in database from iteration 1
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. File upload endpoints fully functional with proper validation (profile picture: max 5MB, images only; resume: max 10MB, PDF/DOC only). Product Tour component fixed and shows beacon on first dashboard visit. Theme switching, Aptitude/Reasoning 10/20 questions, and password reset all working correctly.

file_upload_profile_picture.details: Upload works, validates file type (images only), validates size (max 5MB), persists URL in profile

file_upload_resume.details: Upload works, validates file type (PDF/DOC only), validates size (max 10MB), persists URL and filename in profile

product_tour.details: Tour component renders, shows beacon on first visit. Beacon visible near Aptitude nav item. May need disableBeacon adjustment if auto-start tooltip is required.

theme_switching.details: Dark mode: rgb(2, 8, 23), Light mode: rgb(255, 255, 255). Toggle works both ways.

password_reset.note: MOCKED - No actual email sent, dev link displayed in UI

mocked_apis.password_reset_email: MOCKED - Token logged to console, dev link shown in UI
mocked_apis.interview_ai_responses: Local heuristic logic, no external AI API

bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed from 'import Joyride' to 'import { Joyride }' for v3 compatibility
Changed endpoint to accept JSON body instead of query parameter
Initialized steps array with dashboardSteps instead of empty array
